commandSourceProbe.stderr:
`context-pruner lookup --command ...` is disabled when `CONTEXT_PRUNER_BACKEND=codex`; use bounded --file-path or --pattern lookups instead.

Usage:
  context-pruner lookup --query <query> --file-path <path> [--start-line <n> --end-line <n>]
  context-pruner lookup --query <query> --file-path <path> [--around-line <n> --radius <n>]
  context-pruner lookup --query <query> --pattern <regex> --path <path> [--context-lines <n>] [--max-matches <n>]
  context-pruner lookup --query <query> --command <shell-command>

Options:
  --query <query>       Required remote retention goal submitted as { code, query }.
  --file-path <path>    File source for a bounded lookup window.
  --start-line <n>      1-based inclusive start line for file-window lookups.
  --end-line <n>        1-based inclusive end line for file-window lookups.
  --around-line <n>     1-based anchor line for around/radius file-window lookups.
  --radius <n>          Context radius used with --around-line. Default: 20
  --pattern <regex>     Grep-style source selector used before remote lookup.
  --path <path>         Required explicit file or directory scope for grep lookups.
  --context-lines <n>   Number of surrounding lines to include. Max: 50
  --max-matches <n>     Maximum output lines before truncation. Default: 200
  --command <command>   Exception-only shell source when the answer cannot come directly from files.
  --focus <query>       Deprecated compatibility alias for --query.

scopeEscapeProbe.stderr: Path is outside the configured context-pruner scope: /home/jordan/code/symphony-workspaces/IDL-1149/SPEC.md. Allowed scope: roots=elixir/docs

forbidden: repo reads outside the local selector result
passedIn: bounded source text from the local selector
explicit auth material through passthrough env or CONTEXT_PRUNER_CODEX_AUTH_FILE
narrow env passthrough list for auth/network only
isolationContract.workerCwd: fresh temporary directory outside the repository

lookupPreparation.command: context-pruner lookup --query "Keep only the preferred remote env vars, the compatibility alias rule, the request body shape, and the primary response field." --file-path elixir/docs/context_pruner.md --start-line 94 --end-line 179
lookupPreparation.returnedText:
- `PRUNER_URL`
- `PRUNER_TIMEOUT_MS`
- `JEEVES_PRUNER_URL` is accepted only when `PRUNER_URL` is unset
- request body: `{ "code": "...", "query": "..." }`
- primary response field: `pruned_code`
lookupPreparation.tokenSavingsRequires: The lookup worker runs before the measured main-thread turn; only the returned excerpt enters the measured prompt.

commandHints: context-pruner lookup --query "Keep only the preferred remote env vars, the compatibility alias rule, the request body shape, and the primary response field." --file-path elixir/docs/context_pruner.md --start-line 94 --end-line 179

rerun.defaultCommand: cd elixir && mise exec -- mix run --no-start scripts/measure_context_pruner_token_savings.exs
